title: popstats server extractor (umbrella)
description: Single extractor envelope for any popstats server response. Discriminated by the `statistic` field — the body of `metadata` and `windows` is per-statistic and validated against the corresponding per-statistic extractor schema.

common_fields_in_all_responses.schema_version: Engine version tag (e.g. 'xpehh_v1'). Used by clients to opt into known shapes.
common_fields_in_all_responses.request_id: Echoed from the activator if supplied.
common_fields_in_all_responses.status: One of 'ok' / 'empty' / 'error'. 'empty' = engine ran but produced no windows (e.g. cohort filter dropped everything).
common_fields_in_all_responses.metadata: Per-statistic header bag (engine name, n_samples, threshold params, global stats).
common_fields_in_all_responses.windows: Array of per-window records, ordered by chrom + window_start ascending.

status_codes.empty: windows array present but length 0; check metadata for why (filters too strict, cohort too small, etc.).
status_codes.error: engine failed or activator was malformed; `error` field carries the message.
